subcodes.first_line: O Ali, upon thee be My Glory! Today the eye of justice is blinded and the hand of tyranny is lifted high. We have illumined [all] with the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی امروز چشم انصاف کور و دست اعتساف بلند بنور هدایت نموده ایم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
